| > ALBEE                                 oe
           His house is much bigger than mine.
,    他的房子比我的大得多。
           Tom works harder than Jason.
    汤姆比杰森工作努力。
more gnd more + Ji.     |
'@      The weather is colder and colder.
| 天气越来越冷。   二
图 The girl is becoming more and more beautiful.
1    RAKBRGAR AEE.       !
a. 就越…                     人
|            The more you eat, the fatter you will be.          1
1    你吃得越多,就越容易变胖。

            This computer is less expensive than that one. |
ay TE CSL Sa TV VSS a        1
    这台电脑没那台贵。

mes                                                   S| [bes
HKEBaeME ooo (i
ET
1

，娘同级比较句型     o> ae
1     RAR9                                              1
1          一At谓语+as+原级+as+B                     1
          一A和B一样.…
              She ran Gasias Tom.           YZ   :

S                                 1
NT 她跑得和汤姆一样快。
               一At+谓语否定not so/as+原级+as+B              1
          一A和B不一样.….
  (ee)   She did ‘not run so/as fast as) Tom.
!     她没有汤姆跑得快。
1                                                          1
，女比较级表达最高级     oo
     CORR GED                           1
| Tom is thelmosthard-workingistudent in our class. |
1

1

    =Tom is more hard-working than
| in our class.                           |
              入比较级+than+any other+名词单数形式

-|        i
    =Tom is more hard-working than                   °
| the other students in our class.
1                                                      @
             和比较级+than+the other +名词复数形式           1

一       i
A CF [SL GL IGF SH

1全 pen is_______ than that one.               e   :

      C.much cheaper           D.quite cheaper “~
4The dumplings are____ than the noodles, think.
      A.more nicer               B.much delicious           (
      C.very nice                 D.much more delicious    :

11.Which does Jimmy like_______,Chinese or Art?  ，
1 wow                                     wen        !
C Awell          B.best  C.better        D.much |

1
                句意:吉米更喜欢哪门学科.中文还是艺术? WDD!
“             二> which/Who+谓语+比较级Aor B?                   '
t
        [解析   一A.B哪个更…                             ，
!                                 like better更喜欢.选C                                     1
i         be
12.My hair is longer than____—_.
  C Amy sister B.Kate C.my brother's D.Lucys’,
1
|                句意:我的头发比我弟弟的长。                     1
A++谓语+比较级 +than +B一A比B更……       1
1      几
            [解析] 一 进行比较的对象是头发.A/B都是人不是头发 ，
i                                  C.my brother's是名词所有格,省略了后面的hair |
et            C正确选C
                    D应该改成Cucy's
1
13.The pen is_____ than that one.
1
1
  C Amore cheap            B.cheap                  '
1
1                                     °
1       Cmuch cheaper            D.quite cheaper            !
1
|                句意:这支钢笔比那支便宜得多。                    ，
A+谓语+比较级+than +B一A比B更……       1
|          ‘(MO aseses eancenespeRee
1                    cheaper前面不需要加more
1                    副词quite(相当)一般不用来修饰比较级          1
t            ons       cheap-cheaper-cheapest                    ;
;         oy ty        much cheaper {# E43 3 iC                       ;
ee ee os ee ee See

‘4.The dumplings are             than, the noodles,I think. :
.           plings are_____than,                    :
| D Amore nicer           B.much delicious

/        ;                          a.     1
|      C.very nice                  D.much more delicious — ,
1 DDD      句意:我认为饺子比面条可口。
1          A+谓语+比较级+than +B-A比B更……
&
1          [解析 ]   ? delicious-more delicious-most delicious        '
|                                  much more delicious美味得多.,选D                     1
1
i              tate ata
.5.The yellow river isn't SO as the    (exe)
 changjiang river.
if

1

1   ta    ‘+ ARLE A
'       [解析 二 否定一A+谓语否定not solas 1GB+08 +B    i
                  一A和B不一样…                            !
|                    空处填原级long选A        A         t
1

16.The earth is getting.
rhe
|  C Awarm and warmer       B.warmer and warm      1
1
|      C.warmer and warmer “D.waqrm and warm        !
1
|                句意:地球变得越来越暖。                         ，
1                                              比较级 +and +比较级一越来越…
i         ‘ [解析] warm-warmer-warmest
1                                 warmer and warmer选C
1
